title: Arrowrailgun
description: use /railgun to get or use 1 nether star and 1 crossbow to make a railgun and shoot 16 deadly arrows at once
body: ArrowRailgun is a simple Fabric mod that adds a powerful single-use railgun to Minecraft. Crafted from a crossbow and a nether star, this weapon can fire 16 arrows simultaneously in one devastating burst. After firing, the railgun breaks immediately, making it a high-risk, high-reward tool for emergency situations or boss fights. An OP command /railgun is also available for creative testing.
